"'''Soldiers of the Empire!'''" was an article written by [[Anthony Fredrickson]] and appearing in [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 4|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 4]], released in [[January]] [[1978]]. It detailed the training and organization of the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]], and was the first source to reveal the fact that many were [[Cloning/Legends|clones]].
